name: viberator-monorepo
description: Viberator monorepo - AI Agent Orchestrator and Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @viberator/orchestrator" "npm run dev -w @viberator/platform-backend" "npm run dev -w @viberator/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @viberator/types && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.platform:dev: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run dev -w @viberator/platform-backend" "npm run dev -w @viberator/frontend"
scripts.platform:build: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run build -w @viberator/platform-backend" "npm run build -w @viberator/frontend"
scripts.platform:start: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run start -w @viberator/platform-backend" "npm run start -w @viberator/frontend"
